race.comment: INSOLENCE (4) resumes. He was sent out $1.85 in a high-rating maiden on debut at Seymour but was well beaten. Respecting that SP and he's jumped out well leading into this campaign, go close in a suitable affair. BOURNE LEGACY (1) wasn't far away on debut at Caulfield Heath in a solid showing, beaten three lengths. Better for that and will take holding out. PRAY FOR ELEGANCE (6) is a Brutal gelding on debut for the Payne yard who cruised home down the outside in a recent trial when second. There looks to be a motor there but the draw isn't ideal. LADY OF POMPEII (10) ran well on debut behind a subsequent Saturday winner and maps for every chance, respecting.
